notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-292 — thanks for testing! FIX THIS BUILD — the 🔔 'What's changed for me' briefing could open TWICE: once for yesterday's cached data, then again after the app auto-refreshed to today's data (the date flipped mid-session). It now opens once when fresh data lands; a real new trading day still gets its own briefing, and 🔔 reopens the latest any time. If you were seeing it pop a second time right after you closed it — this build fixes that; please confirm. Also live from the recent run (v282–v291): 📋 My trading rules ON/OFF switch, search-in-report, ☀️/🌙 light & dark, ⛶ full screen, 🕳 Gap Report, 🧱 Strong Trends, sticky 💧 Liquidity floor. Anything odd — use the ✉ feedback link top-left. Your data stays in its own BETA space.
